title: Showbal #7732
definition:
Shobal = "flowing"

 1) the 2nd son of Seir the Horite (Edom) and one of the dukes of the
    Horites
 2) son of Caleb, grandson of Hur, and founder of Kirjath-jearim
 3) a Judaite, son of Hur and a descendant of Caleb
    3a) possibly the same as 2
